rules.trade_description: NYK's pick is in the main pool {BRK, PHI(if 9-30), PHX, NYK}. BRK gets most/two most favorable. NYK gets the 2nd most favorable of {BRK, PHX, NYK} in most scenarios; NYK gets the least favorable of {BRK, PHX, NYK} if NYK and/or PHI(9-30) is less favorable than both BRK and PHX.
